00001| // ==================== CONFIGURATION ==================== 00002| 00003| const API_BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:5000'; 00004| const REFRESH_INTERVAL = 30000; 00005| 00006| let costChart = null; 00007| let usageChart = null; 00008| let aqiGauge = null; 00009| 00010| // ==================== UTILITY FUNCTIONS ==================== 00011| 00012| function formatCurrency(value) { 00013| return `$${value.toFixed(0)}`; 00014| } 00015| 00016| function formatDate() { 00017| const now = new Date(); 00018| const options = { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' }; 00019| return now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', options); 00020| } 00021| 00022| function getAQICategory(aqiValue) { 00023| if (aqiValue <= 50) return { category: 'Good', color: '#06ffa5' }; 00024| else if (aqiValue <= 100) return { category: 'Moderate', color: '#ffd166' }; 00025| else if (aqiValue <= 150) return { category: 'Unhealthy for Sensitive', color: '#ff9f40' }; 00026| else if (aqiValue <= 200) return { category: 'Unhealthy', color: '#ff6b9d' }; 00027| else if (aqiValue <= 300) return { category: 'Very Unhealthy', color: '#c77dff' }; 00028| else return { category: 'Hazardous', color: '#ff4757' }; 00029| } 00030| 00031| // ==================== FETCH DATA FUNCTIONS ==================== 00032| 00033| async function fetchLatestAQI() { 00034| try { 00035| const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/aqi/latest`); 00036| const result = await response.json(); 00037| 00038| if (result.status === 'success') { 00039| updateAQIDisplay(result.data); 00040| } 00041| } catch (error) { 00042| console.error('Error fetching AQI data:', error); 00043| } 00044| } 00045| 00046| async function fetchElectricityData() { 00047| try { 00048| const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/electricity/history?limit=100`); 00049| const result = await response.json(); 00050| 00051| if (result.status === 'success') { 00052| updateAppliancesDisplay(result.data); 00053| updateCostPredicted(result.data); 00054| updateUsageEstimate(result.data); 00055| updateCarbonFootprint(result.data); 00056| } 00057| } catch (error) { 00058| console.error('Error fetching electricity data:', error); 00059| } 00060| } 00061| 00062| // ==================== UPDATE DISPLAY FUNCTIONS ==================== 00063| 00064| function updateAQIDisplay(data) { 00065| let avgAQI = 0; 00066| let count = 0; 00067| 00068| if (data.indoor) { 00069| document.getElementById('indoorAQI').textContent = data.indoor.aqi_value; 00070| avgAQI += data.indoor.aqi_value; 00071| count++; 00072| } 00073| 00074| if (data.outdoor) { 00075| document.getElementById('outdoorAQI').textContent = data.outdoor.aqi_value; 00076| avgAQI += data.outdoor.aqi_value; 00077| count++; 00078| } 00079| 00080| if (count > 0) { 00081| avgAQI = Math.round(avgAQI / count); 00082| document.getElementById('aqiValue').textContent = avgAQI; 00083| createAQIGauge(avgAQI); 00084| } 00085| } 00086| 00087| function updateAppliancesDisplay(data) { 00088| const appliancesList = document.getElementById('appliancesList'); 00089| 00090| // Get latest reading for each device 00091| const deviceMap = {}; 00092| data.forEach(record => { 00093| if (!deviceMap[record.device_name] || 00094| new Date(record.timestamp) > new Date(deviceMap[record.device_name].timestamp)) { 00095| deviceMap[record.device_name] = record; 00096| } 00097| }); 00098| 00099| // Define colors for each appliance 00100| const colors = { 00101| 'TV': '#ff6b9d', 00102| 'Router': '#c77dff', 00103| 'Charger': '#4ecdc4', 00104| 'Refrigerator': '#ffd166' 00105| }; 00106| 00107| // Sort by power consumption 00108| const devices = Object.values(deviceMap).sort((a, b) => b.power_watts - a.power_watts); 00109| 00110| let html = ''; 00111| devices.forEach(device => { 00112| const maxPower = 200; // Maximum power for bar width calculation 00113| const barWidth = Math.min((device.power_watts / maxPower) * 100, 100); 00114| const color = colors[device.device_name] || '#4ecdc4'; 00115| 00116| html += ` 00117|
00118|
${device.device_name}
00119|
00120|
00121|
00122|
${device.power_watts.toFixed(1)} kWh
00123|
00124| `; 00125| }); 00126| 00127| appliancesList.innerHTML = html; 00128| } 00129| 00130| function updateCostPredicted(data) { 00131| // Calculate total power consumption 00132| let totalPower = 0; 00133| data.forEach(record => { 00134| totalPower += record.power_watts; 00135| }); 00136| 00137| // Estimate cost (assuming $0.12 per kWh) 00138| const avgPowerKW = totalPower / data.length / 1000; 00139| const hoursPerMonth = 730; 00140| const costPerKWh = 0.12; 00141| const totalCost = avgPowerKW * hoursPerMonth * costPerKWh; 00142| 00143| // Split between electricity (80%) and gas (20%) 00144| const electricityCost = totalCost * 0.8; 00145| const gasCost = totalCost * 0.2; 00146| 00147| document.getElementById('totalCost').textContent = formatCurrency(totalCost); 00148| 00149| // Update cost comparison 00150| const lastMonthCost = totalCost * 0.95; // Simulate last month (5% less) 00151| const changePercent = ((totalCost - lastMonthCost) / lastMonthCost * 100).toFixed(2); 00152| 00153| document.getElementById('lastMonthValue').textContent = formatCurrency(lastMonthCost); 00154| document.getElementById('currentMonthValue').textContent = formatCurrency(totalCost); 00155| document.getElementById('changePercentage').textContent = `${changePercent}%`; 00156| 00157| createCostChart(electricityCost, gasCost); 00158| } 00159| 00160| function updateUsageEstimate(data) { 00161| // Calculate usage 00162| let totalPower = 0; 00163| data.forEach(record => { 00164| totalPower += record.power_watts; 00165| }); 00166| 00167| const avgPowerKW = totalPower / data.length / 1000; 00168| const currentDay = new Date().getDate(); 00169| const daysInMonth = 30; 00170| 00171| const usageTillNow = avgPowerKW * currentDay * 24; 00172| const usagePredicted = avgPowerKW * daysInMonth * 24; 00173| 00174| document.getElementById('usageTillNow').textContent = `${usageTillNow.toFixed(1)} kWh`; 00175| document.getElementById('usagePredicted').textContent = `${usagePredicted.toFixed(1)} kWh`; 00176| 00177| createUsageChart(usageTillNow, usagePredicted); 00178| } 00179| 00180| function updateCarbonFootprint(data) { 00181| // Calculate emissions (0.92 lbs CO2 per kWh = 0.417 kg CO2 per kWh) 00182| let totalPower = 0; 00183| data.forEach(record => { 00184| totalPower += record.power_watts; 00185| }); 00186| 00187| const avgPowerKW = totalPower / data.length / 1000; 00188| const currentDay = new Date().getDate(); 00189| const daysInMonth = 30; 00190| 00191| const usageTillNow = avgPowerKW * currentDay * 24; 00192| const usagePredicted = avgPowerKW * daysInMonth * 24; 00193| 00194| const emissionTillDate = usageTillNow * 0.417; 00195| const emissionPredicted = usagePredicted * 0.417; 00196| 00197| document.getElementById('emissionTillDate').textContent = `${emissionTillDate.toFixed(1)} Kg of CO2`; 00198| document.getElementById('emissionPredicted').textContent = `${emissionPredicted.toFixed(1)} Kg of CO2`; 00199| 00200| // Green energy (simulate 30% of usage) 00201| const greenEnergy = usageTillNow * 0.3; 00202| const greenGoal = 500; 00203| const greenPercent = Math.min((greenEnergy / greenGoal) * 100, 100); 00204| 00205| document.getElementById('greenCurrent').textContent = `${greenEnergy.toFixed(0)} kWh`; 00206| document.getElementById('greenProgress').style.width = `${greenPercent}%`; 00207| } 00208| 00209| // ==================== CHART FUNCTIONS ==================== 00210| 00211| function createCostChart(electricityCost, gasCost) { 00212| const ctx = document.getElementById('costChart'); 00213| if (!ctx) return; 00214| 00215| if (costChart) { 00216| costChart.destroy(); 00217| } 00218| 00219| costChart = new Chart(ctx, { 00220| type: 'doughnut', 00221| data: { 00222| labels: ['Electricity', 'Gas'], 00223| datasets: [{ 00224| data: [electricityCost, gasCost], 00225| backgroundColor: ['#4ecdc4', '#ffd166'], 00226| borderWidth: 0 00227| }] 00228| }, 00229| options: { 00230| responsive: true, 00231| maintainAspectRatio: false, 00232| cutout: '75%', 00233| plugins: { 00234| legend: { 00235| display: false 00236| }, 00237| tooltip: { 00238| callbacks: { 00239| label: function(context) { 00240| return context.label + ': $' + context.parsed.toFixed(2); 00241| } 00242| } 00243| } 00244| } 00245| } 00246| }); 00247| } 00248| 00249| function createUsageChart(tillNow, predicted) { 00250| const ctx = document.getElementById('usageChart'); 00251| if (!ctx) return; 00252| 00253| if (usageChart) { 00254| usageChart.destroy(); 00255| } 00256| 00257| // Generate data for the month 00258| const currentDay = new Date().getDate(); 00259| const labels = []; 00260| const data = []; 00261| 00262| for (let i = 1; i <= 30; i++) { 00263| labels.push(`Jun ${i}`); 00264| if (i <= currentDay) { 00265| data.push((tillNow / currentDay) * i); 00266| } else { 00267| data.push(null); 00268| } 00269| } 00270| 00271| usageChart = new Chart(ctx, { 00272| type: 'line', 00273| data: { 00274| labels: labels, 00275| datasets: [{ 00276| data: data, 00277| borderColor: '#ff6b9d', 00278| backgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 107, 157, 0.1)', 00279| fill: true, 00280| tension: 0.4, 00281| pointRadius: 4, 00282| pointBackgroundColor: '#ff6b9d', 00283| pointBorderColor: '#fff', 00284| pointBorderWidth: 2 00285| }] 00286| }, 00287| options: { 00288| responsive: true, 00289| maintainAspectRatio: false, 00290| plugins: { 00291| legend: { 00292| display: false 00293| } 00294| }, 00295| scales: { 00296| x: { 00297| display: true, 00298| grid: { 00299| color: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)' 00300| }, 00301| ticks: { 00302| color: '#b0c4de', 00303| maxRotation: 0, 00304| autoSkip: true, 00305| maxTicksLimit: 6 00306| } 00307| }, 00308| y: { 00309| display: true, 00310| grid: { 00311| color: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)' 00312| }, 00313| ticks: { 00314| color: '#b0c4de' 00315| } 00316| } 00317| } 00318| } 00319| }); 00320| } 00321| 00322| function createAQIGauge(aqiValue) { 00323| const ctx = document.getElementById('aqiGauge'); 00324| if (!ctx) return; 00325| 00326| if (aqiGauge) { 00327| aqiGauge.destroy(); 00328| } 00329| 00330| const aqiInfo = getAQICategory(aqiValue); 00331| const maxAQI = 500; 00332| const percentage = (aqiValue / maxAQI) * 100; 00333| 00334| aqiGauge = new Chart(ctx, { 00335| type: 'doughnut', 00336| data: { 00337| datasets: [{ 00338| data: [percentage, 100 - percentage], 00339| backgroundColor: [aqiInfo.color, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)'], 00340| borderWidth: 0 00341| }] 00342| }, 00343| options: { 00344| responsive: true, 00345| maintainAspectRatio: false, 00346| cutout: '75%', 00347| rotation: -90, 00348| circumference: 180, 00349| plugins: { 00350| legend: { 00351| display: false 00352| }, 00353| tooltip: { 00354| enabled: false 00355| } 00356| } 00357| } 00358| }); 00359| } 00360| 00361| // ==================== INITIALIZATION ==================== 00362| 00363| async function refreshDashboard() { 00364| console.log('Refreshing dashboard...'); 00365| document.getElementById('currentDate').textContent = formatDate(); 00366| 00367| await Promise.all([ 00368| fetchLatestAQI(), 00369| fetchElectricityData() 00370| ]); 00371| } 00372| 00373| window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { 00374| console.log('EcoTrack Dashboard Initialized'); 00375| refreshDashboard(); 00376| setInterval(refreshDashboard, REFRESH_INTERVAL); 00377| }); 00378| (End of file - total 378 lines)
